name: tag-lens
description: Visualize tag–note relationships in your Obsidian Bases vault. Co-occurrence heatmap, intersection lattice, BubbleSets, and Icon Gallery.
author: laximgqozaZZZYT

scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && node test/run.mjs && knip && node esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.e2e:bubblesets: node esbuild.config.mjs && node test/e2e/setup-e2e-vault.mjs && node test/e2e/e2e-bubblesets.mjs
